hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -e '.claude/commands/.*\.md' -e '.claude/settings.json' -e '.claude/statusline-command.sh'; then ~/Projects/claude-skills/sync.sh 'chore: auto-sync after edit' 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -e '.claude/commands/.*\.md' -e '.claude/settings.json' -e '.claude/statusline-command.sh'; then ~/Projects/claude-skills/sync.sh 'chore: auto-sync after write' 2>/dev/null; fi
